title: osmanthus collinus
intro: Osmanthus collinus, also known as the fragrant osmanthus or fragrant tea olive, is a small, deciduous shrub native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in traditional Chinese medicine for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Osmanthus collinus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
